records.score_reason: Pharmacies often have recurring procurement, inventory, and supplier communication workflows that can benefit from lightweight automation.
records.suggested_offer: Inventory and supplier communication workflow audit.
records.suggested_first_message: I noticed your pharmacy may handle recurring inventory and supplier coordination. Would a short workflow audit be useful to find admin tasks that can be automated safely?
records.recommended_next_action: Research current website/contact path, then prepare a pharmacy-specific workflow audit note.
records.risk_notes: Healthcare-adjacent outreach should avoid patient data claims and stay focused on operations, procurement, and public business information.
